backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (Message, UserProfile, FriendRequest, MessageThread) and backend logic for a chat app including public messaging, user profile management, and access-control-gated operations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two features: fixing the Internet Identity login flow in ChatView/useInternetIdentity, and auditing the useActor hook initialisation sequence to ensure authenticated actor availability before backend calls.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to one-line summaries describing the purpose and key changes of each component, hook, and config file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Tailwind directives and defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, sidebar, and chart tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with app title, meta description, Open Graph and Twitter Card tags for social sharing, favicon links, and the root div with the main TSX module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders ChatView as the sole page of the application.
frontend/src/components/ChatView.tsx: Main chat layout component handling Internet Identity authentication, actor readiness, profile loading, video call state, and rendering of MessageFeed, FriendsPanel, PrivateChatView, and VideoCallModal based on auth state.
frontend/src/components/DisplayNamePromp: Onboarding card component for entering a display name and username, with actor-readiness guard, connecting spinner, and error handling before saving the user profile.
frontend/src/components/FriendListItem.t: Renders a single friend entry in the friends list with avatar, online status indicator, and a video call button that appears on hover.
frontend/src/components/FriendRequestIte: Displays an incoming friend request with the requester's avatar and name, plus accept/decline buttons that trigger the corresponding mutations.
frontend/src/components/FriendsPanel.tsx: Full friends sidebar panel with a search input, tabbed sections for friends list and pending requests, and the ability to send friend requests to search results.
frontend/src/components/MessageFeed.tsx: Renders the global chat message feed sorted by timestamp, showing colored avatars and styled bubbles that distinguish the current user's messages from others.
frontend/src/components/MessageInput.tsx: Controlled input form for posting a new global chat message, with Enter-key support and a loading spinner during submission.
Private one-on-one chat view between the current user and a selected friend, including a message thread, send form, and a video call button in the header.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Onboarding modal that collects a username and display name from a new user and saves the profile via a mutation, with validation and network-readiness checks.
frontend/src/components/VideoCallModal.t: React modal component for an active video call, displaying a remote participant avatar, local video PiP, and controls for mute, camera toggle, and ending the call.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for interacting with the backend, covering user profiles, messages, and friends list CRUD and query operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useVideoCall.ts: Custom hook managing simulated video call state, including acquiring local media, attaching streams to video/audio elements, and toggling mute/camera with a simulated connection timer.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Inter font and Tailwind, defining CSS custom properties for a warm coral/amber light theme, dark theme, and video call UI tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a custom theme with OKLCH-based color tokens, extended border radii, box shadows, accordion animations, and plugins for animate and typography.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking the chat app's version, existing features, known issues, and architectural notes for build planning purposes.
